signInDescription: Welcome back. Enter your credentials to continue.
createAccountDescription: Get started with your free workspace.
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send password reset instructions.
resetPasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
registrationFailed: Registration failed. Email may already be in use.
resetRequestFailed: Unable to process password reset request.
resetSuccess: If an account exists for this email, reset instructions have been prepared.
